scripts.build: python3 scripts/bootstrap_build_python.py && .build-venv/bin/python scripts/validate_dashboard_batches.py && .build-venv/bin/python scripts/generate_public_dashboard_payloads.py && .build-venv/bin/python scripts/generate_data_catalog.py && .build-venv/bin/python scripts/validate_public_data_contracts.py && astro build
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build && npm run audit
